title: Beds Plus
description: mob-themed versions inspired by creatures like creepers, zombies, and skeletons. Each bed color features a unique mob design, adding personality and creativity to your world while keeping normal bed
body:
Bring your Minecraft world to life with this unique texture pack! All beds in the game are reimagined with designs inspired by iconic mobs. Each bed color now features a custom look based on classic creatures like zombies, creepers, skeletons, animals, and many more.

It’s perfect for players who want to add personality, humor, or a thematic touch to their base. Despite the new appearance, all beds still function normally — they just look a lot more alive!

Great for survival worlds, themed maps, and creative servers.
Give your game a fresh twist with these mob-themed beds!
